tools.name: look
tools.description: Capture a fresh still from the robot camera. Use before and after acting to verify the effect. Your only visual input. With no arguments you get the full COMPOSITE (all camera tiles) — best for scene-level judgement (robot left vs right, where things are). Pass `camera` (a role name from the "Camera layout" context, e.g. "overhead" or "left_wrist") to get just that camera's tile — best for a close look at one arm/view. An unknown role returns an error naming the valid roles, not an image. Arms can be easily moved to get different view angles of the scene.

camera.description: optional camera role from the layout; omit for the full composite

tools.name: get_state
tools.description: Current joint positions + lift + base (proprioception, normalized). No image.

tools.name: move_to
tools.description: Move one arm's joints to ABSOLUTE normalized targets and WAIT for arrival. Returns done|blocked|clamped|timeout. Best for 'go to pose X'.

targets.description: subset of {shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, wrist_roll, gripper} -> target, e.g. {"shoulder_pan": 30, "gripper": 0}

tools.name: reach
tools.description: Task-space (cylindrical) jog held for ms, then stopped. Timed and open-loop — use short pulses and re-look.

dofs.description: subset of {x, y, pitch, shoulder_pan, wrist_roll, gripper}, each a rate in [-1,1]; +x forward, +y left

tools.name: grip
tools.description: Open or close the gripper on one arm.

tools.name: base
tools.description: Drive the mobile base for ms. linear (+forward) and angular (+turn left), rates in [-1,1]. Open-loop, timed.

tools.name: lift
tools.description: Raise/lower one arm's vertical rail for ms. dir in [-1,1], + = up. Open-loop, timed.

tools.name: play_audio
tools.description: Play a short audio clip on the robot's speaker from a URL (CORS-enabled https:// or a data: URL to an audio file; clips only, not live streams). Returns ok or an error.

url.description: https:// (CORS-enabled) or data: URL to an audio file

tools.name: done
tools.description: The goal is achieved. Ends the run.

tools.name: give_up
tools.description: The goal can't be done safely or at all. Ends the run.

agentToolsRef:
look       Capture a fresh still from the robot camera. Use before and after acting to verify the effect. Your only visual input. With no arguments you get the full COMPOSITE (all camera tiles) — best for scene-level judgement (robot left vs right, where things are). Pass `camera` (a role name from the "Camera layout" context, e.g. "overhead" or "left_wrist") to get just that camera's tile — best for a close look at one arm/view. An unknown role returns an error naming the valid roles, not an image. Arms can be easily moved to get different view angles of the scene.
  get_state  Current joint positions + lift + base (proprioception, normalized). No image.
  move_to    Move one arm's joints to ABSOLUTE normalized targets and WAIT for arrival. Returns done|blocked|clamped|timeout. Best for 'go to pose X'.
  reach      Task-space (cylindrical) jog held for ms, then stopped. Timed and open-loop — use short pulses and re-look.
  grip       Open or close the gripper on one arm.
  base       Drive the mobile base for ms. linear (+forward) and angular (+turn left), rates in [-1,1]. Open-loop, timed.
  lift       Raise/lower one arm's vertical rail for ms. dir in [-1,1], + = up. Open-loop, timed.
  wait       Hold position for ms.
  play_audio Play a short audio clip on the robot's speaker from a URL (CORS-enabled https:// or a data: URL to an audio file; clips only, not live streams). Returns ok or an error.
  done       The goal is achieved. Ends the run.
  give_up    The goal can't be done safely or at all. Ends the run.
codegenApiRef:
robot.moveTo(side, targets, opts?)  Absolute joint move: go to a pose and HOLD it (not timed). Returns 'done' | 'blocked' | 'timeout'. Best tool for 'go to pose X'.
  robot.reach(side, dofs, ms)  Task-space (cylindrical) jog via IK. dofs subset of {x, y, pitch, shoulder_pan, wrist_roll, gripper}, each a rate in [-1,1]. Held ms, then zeroed.
  robot.joint(side, dofs, ms)  Per-motor jog (no IK). dofs subset of {shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, wrist_roll, gripper}, each a rate in [-1,1].
  robot.grip(side, "open"|"close")  Convenience gripper open/close.
  robot.base(vec, ms)  Mobile base. vec: { linear, angular } in [-1,1]. +linear = forward, +angular = turn left.
  robot.lift(side, dir, ms)  Raise/lower that arm's vertical rail. dir in [-1,1], + = up.
  robot.wait(ms)  Hold position (the 50 Hz keep-alive continues).
  robot.playAudio(url)  Stream an audio clip (blob/data/https) to the robot speaker; resolves when playback ends.
  robot.telemetry()  -> { loopHz, safety, tempC, state:{...}, currents:{...} } or null. Proprioceptive only (joint positions + currents). NO camera/vision.
  robot.perceive()  -> structured world-state from the on-Pi detector (or null if none). Lets a script react to what the robot sees.
  robot.reset()  Re-sync the IK task cursor to current joint positions. Call before a reach() that follows any joint() move.
  robot.estop()  Emergency latch (the on-screen button is the primary path).
  robot.log(...args)  Print to the operator's run-output panel.
  robot.home(side)  Move the arm to a neutral straight pose and hold.
  robot.stow(side)  Move the arm to a compact parked pose and hold.
  robot.gripSequence(side)  Open, pause, then close the gripper (a simple pick).
  robot.wave(side, times=3)  Wave the wrist.
